title: Korean-Style Doenjang Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional pancakes, these Korean-style doenjang pancakes are savory and delicious. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the toasted Korean flour and doenjang.
Add the water, Korean chili flakes, and sesame oil to the bowl. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with toasted sesame seeds and green onion on top.
